q1.content: Generally, what could be done to make your work life better? You can discuss whatever you feel would make your life better, either now or in the past.
q1.requirement: Learn about what the interviewee thinks could be done to make their work life better. Be curious about their thoughts. Try to get some specific examples or ideas about how to improve their work life. If they need inspiration, you can give them some ideas but try not to bias them. If their answers are too brief or surface-level, probe further to understand their reasoning. You can even ask them what they would tell someone in-power like a lawmaker or employer.
